commit_scope: Move GET /api/contributors and GET /api/contributions from Python graph read fanout into BML front-door native read routes.

local_validation.summary: The BML front-door catalog now defines DB-backed api_contributors and api_contributions handlers plus exact RouteCell rows. The Hostinger Traefik overlay routes both public paths to kernel-router-bml-front-door, and deploy verification now requires native router, handler, python-authority, and paginated body proof.

observed_delta.before_public_probe_contributors: Production GET /api/contributors?limit=5&offset=0 returned HTTP 200 through the Python path with paginated body shape {items: array, total: 169, limit: 5, offset: 0}.
observed_delta.before_public_probe_contributions: Production GET /api/contributions?limit=5&offset=0 returned HTTP 200 through the Python path with paginated empty body shape {items: [], total: 0, limit: 5, offset: 0}.
observed_delta.local_front_door_route_load: form-kernel-rust serve loaded 45 native routes and listed GET /api/contributors and GET /api/contributions as native Form handlers.
observed_delta.local_front_door_probe: Both local endpoints reached the native router and returned X-Form-Router:native-kernel; this worktree lacks a running local Postgres socket, so DB-backed handler bodies returned 503 database unavailable locally.
observed_delta.route_goal_state: docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json reports bml_routes=45, goal_native_share=0.946, and classifies /api/contributors and /api/contributions as kernel-native-high-grammar with handlers api_contributors and api_contributions.

known_limitations.observed: form-kernel-rust check --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml still reports the same 14 unresolved full-catalog names on origin/main and on this branch. This release adds no new checker debt; focused serve proof validates route loading.

api/config/api.json points at a local Postgres socket in this worktree, and no local Postgres is running. Production deploy canary and public verification must prove DB-backed 2xx behavior after merge.

The assets route remains Python fanout. Exact parity depends on Python uuid5(NAMESPACE_URL, 'coherencycoin.com/asset') semantics for slug-shaped assets; the next native release should add a Form/Rust UUID5/SHA1 helper instead of approximating the ID contract.

deploy_validation.notes: Post-merge deploy must show both public routes return X-Form-Router:native-kernel, the matching X-Form-Handler, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and paginated bodies.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public contribution registry reads are invited into the native BML front door by default instead of being served by FastAPI graph read handlers.
test_flows: Refresh native route goal state and confirm both paths are kernel-native-high-grammar.
Run the BML front-door router locally and confirm both paths dispatch through native route cells.
Require deploy/public verification to prove native headers and paginated body contracts against production DB.

phase_gate.reason: Local route proof is complete. PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before claiming public release.
